name: Fresh Strawberry Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice 1 pint basket of washed and hulled Ontario Strawberries; toss with a splash of Grand Marnier or a little granulated sugar.
2. Whisk 3 eggs with 2 teaspoons (10 mL) granulated sugar and 1 pinch of salt until completely blended.
3. Melt a knob of butter, about the size of a medium strawberry, in a nonstick skillet until foamy.
4. Pour in the eggs and cook over medium heat, lifting the edges as they set and tilting the pan to let the uncooked portion run underneath.
5. When the top of the omelet is set but still moist, spoon half the berries across the center of the omelet.
6. With an egg lifter, fold one side of the omelet to the center, almost covering the berries.
7. Lift and fold the opposite side on top.
8. Cut into halves crosswise and place on warmed serving plates.
9. Spoon the remaining berries over the omelets.
10. Sift a very light dusting of powdered or fruit sugar over each serving.
